questions.question: How do I create a Cashog account?
questions.answer: Creating an account is free and easy. Click 'Sign Up' on our homepage, enter your email address, create a password, and you're ready to start earning cashback!

questions.question: How do I reset my password?
questions.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. We'll send you a link to reset your password. Make sure to check your spam folder if you don't see it within a few minutes.

questions.question: How do I update my account information?
questions.answer: Go to your Account Settings page. From there, you can update your email, password, payment methods, and notification preferences.

questions.question: Can I close my Cashog account?
questions.answer: Yes. Contact our support team and they'll help you close your account. Make sure to withdraw any pending cashback before closing.

questions.question: How do I earn cashback?
questions.answer: Simply click through our partner store links, shop as usual, and complete your purchase. Cashback will be automatically tracked and added to your account.

questions.question: When will I receive my cashback?
questions.answer: Cashback is typically confirmed within 30-90 days, depending on the store's return policy. Once confirmed, it becomes available for withdrawal.

questions.question: Why is my cashback showing as pending?
questions.answer: Cashback is pending while stores verify your purchase and wait for the return period to expire. This protects against returns and cancellations.

questions.question: What happens if I return an item?
questions.answer: If you return an item, the cashback for that purchase will be deducted from your account. This is standard practice across all cashback platforms.

questions.question: Can I earn cashback on every purchase?
questions.answer: Most purchases are eligible for cashback, but some exclusions may apply. Check the store's terms on our website for specific details.

questions.question: How do I withdraw my cashback?
questions.answer: Go to your Wallet or Withdraw page, choose your withdrawal method (PayPal, bank transfer, or gift cards), enter the amount, and confirm.

questions.question: What is the minimum withdrawal amount?
questions.answer: The minimum withdrawal amount is $10. Some payment methods may have different minimums - check your withdrawal page for details.

questions.question: How long do withdrawals take?
questions.answer: PayPal withdrawals typically take 1-3 business days. Bank transfers take 3-5 business days. Gift cards are usually instant.

questions.question: Are there any fees for withdrawing?
questions.answer: We don't charge fees for withdrawals. However, your payment provider may have their own fees - please check with them directly.

questions.question: Cashback isn't showing in my account. What should I do?
questions.answer: Wait up to 7 days for tracking. If it still doesn't appear, submit a missing cashback claim with your order confirmation and date of purchase.

questions.question: The Cashog extension isn't working. How do I fix it?
questions.answer: Try clearing your browser cache, reinstalling the extension, or updating your browser. If issues persist, contact our support team.

questions.question: Why am I not seeing cashback on my purchase?
questions.answer: Ensure you clicked through Cashog before purchasing, didn't use ad blockers, and completed checkout in the same session. Also check store exclusions.

questions.question: How do I report a technical issue?
questions.answer: Contact our support team with details about the issue, screenshots if possible, and steps to reproduce the problem.

items.question: How do I change my email address?
items.answer: Go to Account Settings, click on 'Change Email', verify your new email address, and save the changes.

items.question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
items.answer: Go to Security Settings, click 'Enable 2FA', scan the QR code with your authenticator app, and enter the verification code.

items.question: Can I combine cashback with coupons?
items.answer: Yes! You can stack coupons and promo codes with Cashog for even more savings. Just make sure to start through Cashog first.

items.question: Does cashback work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes! Use our mobile app or mobile website to earn cashback on your phone or tablet.

items.question: Which browsers are supported?
items.answer: We support the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. For the best experience, keep your browser updated.

items.question: Do you have a mobile app?
items.answer: Yes! Download our app from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store for easy cashback on the go.
